ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lighting_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lighting system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the lighting system */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal zone where the system is located */,
  "lighting_power_density" REAL /* Lighting power density in W/ft^2 */,
  "total_power" REAL /* Total power consumption of the system in W */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule for the lighting system */,
  "scheduled_hours_week" REAL /* Scheduled hours of operation per week */,
  "actual_load_hours_week" REAL /* Actual load hours of operation per week */,
  "return_air_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of return air for the system */,
  "annual_consumption_kwh" REAL /* Annual consumption of the system in kWh */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the system was installed */,
  "replacement_date" TEXT /* Date the system was last replaced */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Status of the system (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lighting_systems_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lighting_systems_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the thermal zone */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property the zone belongs to */,
  "zone_area_sqft" REAL /* Area of the thermal zone in square feet */,
  "zone_volumes_cf" REAL /* Volume of the thermal zone in cubic feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_zones_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel property */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the property owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lighting schedule */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the lighting schedule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lighting schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "active_days" TEXT /* Days of the week when the schedule is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lighting system */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of consumption */,
  "consumption_kwh" REAL /* Energy consumption in kWh */,
  "consumption_peak_kw" REAL /* Peak energy consumption in kW */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES lighting_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy_data" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal zone */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of occupancy */,
  "occupancy_count" INTEGER /* Number of occupants */,
  "occupancy_percentage" REAL /* Occupancy percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lighting system */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES lighting_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_savings" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy savings record */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lighting system */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of savings */,
  "savings_kwh" REAL /* Energy savings in kWh */,
  "savings_percentage" REAL /* Energy savings percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_savings_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES lighting_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the EMS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the EMS was accessed */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken by the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the EMS was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_benchmark" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark record */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lighting system */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of benchmarking */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Benchmark value (e.g., energy consumption per square foot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_benchmark_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES lighting_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utility_bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utility bill */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the bill was received */,
  "bill_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bill */,
  "bill_type" TEXT /* Type of utility bill (e.g., electricity, gas, water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utility_bills_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
